system_media.name: System Media
system_media.description: Tracks music and video playback from any app via system media controls, helping Magi understand what you listen to and watch.

enabled.label: Enable Media Recording
enabled.description: Automatically detect and record music and videos exposed through system media sessions. Browser tabs and Spotify usually work; NetEase Cloud Music is not currently guaranteed to surface here.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Recording Frequency
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often completed playback records are saved to memory.

min_session_seconds.label: Minimum Play Duration (seconds)
min_session_seconds.description: Playback shorter than this is ignored, mainly to filter out songs or videos you opened and skipped right away.

pause_timeout_seconds.label: Pause Before Ending Record (seconds)
pause_timeout_seconds.description: If playback stays paused longer than this, the current playback record is considered finished. For example, 300 means a 5-minute pause ends the record.

section_notes.sync: These two thresholds decide when a playback record is valid and when it ends: minimum play duration filters out quick skips, while pause-before-ending decides when one listening or watching session should be closed.
